title: Resyntha
subtitle: Research intelligence platform — automated literature review, knowledge extraction, cross-paper analysis, and interactive AI copilot
summary: Resyntha turns a research topic into a structured investigation. It retrieves papers from multiple academic APIs, validates and deduplicates them, extracts structured knowledge using LLMs, computes cross-paper research landscapes, detects research gaps, and provides an interactive AI copilot grounded in the investigation's complete state. Every step runs through a configurable pipeline engine with per-stage retry, partial failure handling, and full execution history.
highlights: Multi-provider retrieval from Semantic Scholar, arXiv, and OpenAlex with concurrent fetching and deduplication
8-rule deterministic paper validation with composite scoring
LLM-powered knowledge extraction across 11 fields per paper
Cross-paper analysis with methodology clustering, keyword co-occurrence, and distribution analysis
6-rule research gap detection with severity levels and recommendations
Interactive RAG-style AI copilot with citation validation and confidence calibration
Stage-based pipeline engine with retry, partial success handling, and full execution observability
Versioned JSONB artifact system for all pipeline outputs
